verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Sometimes it's hard for me to understand Why we pull away from each other so easily Even though we're all walking the same road Yet we build dividing walls between Our brothers and ourselves

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: But I, I don't care what label you may wear if you believe in Jesus you belong with me The bond we share is all I care to see And we can change this world forever if you will join with me Join and sing, sing

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: You're my brother, you're my sister So take me by the hand Together we will work until He comes There's no foe that can defeat us When we're walking side by side As long as there is love We will stand

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: The day will come when we will be as one And with a mighty voice together We will proclaim that Jesus Jesus is King And it will echo through the earth It will shake the nations And the world will see See that

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: You're my brother, you're my sister So take me by the hand Together we will work until He comes There's no foe that can defeat us When we're walking side by side As long as there is love We will stand

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: The time is here, the time is now To take a stand, to make a vow I won't let go, you're not alone Now and forever we'll sing together

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: You're my brother, you're my sister So take me by the hand Together we will work until He comes There's no foe that can defeat us When we're walking side by side As long as there is love
